title: Hire an Expert - help us improve our boards!
excerpt: Hi there! I own a small event planning business and we have been using Monday as a project management platform for about a year. We realize that there are quite a few gaps between how we have things set up and what Monda…

posts.author: LMH_mary (Mary Hanna)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! I own a small event planning business and we have been using Monday as a project management platform for about a year. We realize that there are quite a few gaps between how we have things set up and what Monday is able to do. As a result, we are looking to hire someone to help us rethink our setup, help us integrate other systems (Quickbooks, Squarespace, etc.) and build out a more robust CRM solution. We are hoping to get started on this project at the start of the new year. Would love any recommendations!

posts.author: francesco (Francesco Fiorini)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Mary, we would be happy to assist. As a monday.com Gold Partner since 2017 we are one of the most experienced in the world and have developed one of the most successful application, ‘General Caster’. When can you be available for a quick exploratory call today or later this week, feel free to send a calendar invitation to francesco.fiorini@omnidea.it. Looking forward to hearing from you!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @LMH_mary, and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like a very interesting use case and I would be interested in seeing how the team at CarbonWeb could assist you. We work with companies to improve their environment and workflows by developing your solution component-by-component.

I’d be interested in learning a bit more about your plans moving forward and would be happy to provide you with a consultation to explore what might be possible. Please schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LMH_mary welcome to the monday community!

There are lots of great partners here who can help you out!

at timlittletech we have set up many small and medium size businesses with custom solutions on monday.com. We have extensive experience integrating systems include quickbooks, mailchimp, shopify. We will help design and build a system that works great for your specific needs!

if you’d like to chat more about the opportunity to work together please reach out here to schedule a call: Calendly - Tim Little

I look forward to hearing from you!

Best Regards!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @LMH_mary - Welcome to the community. My company has a strong background in everything you mentioned: custom monday․com implementation & optimization, event management planning systems in monday, website integration and custom CRM solutions. We also are an authorized partner with the leading QBO integration app for monday․com, Automated Invoice Tracker. I’d love to get together with you to learn more about your event planning business and see how Polished Geek can help.

Here’s where you can book a time with us: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

There are only a few times left available before the holiday break, so if you are eager to connect soon and have trouble finding a time, email me personally at deb@polishedgeek.com and I’m sure we can arrange something for you before the holidays.

I look forward to meeting you, Mary.

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek

Book a Consultation with a monday․com expert: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Mary! Our team would love to talk to you about your monday.com needs. If you are still looking for a partner, please send an email to jenna@iointegration.com and we can schedule an intro call. Happy holidays!! – Jenna & the monday.com team @ IOI

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LMH_mary !

Welcome to the monday community.

You are unable to make the most of monday .com since you have not set up things appropriately. I would suggest you hire monday.com experts from a certified partner who can help you in restructuring the entire setup whilst integrating third-party applications like Squarespace, Quickbooks, etc. that you use in your event planning business. By seeking help from an expert, you can certainly build a robust CRM solution.
